PDCP.title: NR; Packet Data Convergence Protocol (PDCP) specification

fix_recommendations: Review recent code changes in affected components
Add detailed logging around error location
Add unit tests to verify correct behavior
Check input parameters and error handling

comprehensive_rca.summary:
Root Cause Analysis for pdcp_failure in PDCP layer

Specification Context:
This functionality is governed by 3GPP 38.323 - NR; Packet Data Convergence Protocol (PDCP) specification. 
Recommended Fixes:
- Add detailed logging around error location
- Check input parameters and error handling
- Review recent code changes in affected components
- Add unit tests to verify correct behavior

Impact Assessment:
- User Experience: medium impact
- System Performance: medium impact
- System Stability: medium impact
- Cascade Effects: This issue may affect the following layers:
  * RRC: Issues in PDCP can propagate to RRC layer, affecting its functionality
  * NGAP: Issues in PDCP can propagate to NGAP layer, affecting its functionality
  * F1AP: Issues in PDCP can propagate to F1AP layer, affecting its functionality
fix_recommendations: Add detailed logging around error location
Check input parameters and error handling
Review recent code changes in affected components
Add unit tests to verify correct behavior
